Uses of Class
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst.ContextStatementBlockInstantiation

Packages that use ContextStatementBlockInstantiation
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor
contains classes representing visitors traversing the tree structure of Java programs.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst
contains classes for the instantiation of schema variables of Taclets.

  • Uses of ContextStatementBlockInstantiation in de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor with parameters of type ContextStatementBlockInstantiation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
    ProgramContextAdder.start(JavaNonTerminalProgramElement context, StatementBlock putIn, ContextStatementBlockInstantiation ct)
    wraps the context around the statements found in the putIn block

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ContextStatementBlockInstantiation
    SVInstantiations.getContextInstantiation()
    returns the instantiation entry for the context "schema variable" or null if non such exists
